script_text: When you read a fact book, ask yourself two questions!
voice_direction: Warm, inviting teacher voice. Slight lift on 'two questions'.

script_text: First ask: Who wrote it? That tells you the AUTHOR!
voice_direction: Clear teacher voice, emphasize 'Who wrote it' and 'AUTHOR'.

script_text: Then ask: What are they teaching me? That's their MESSAGE!
voice_direction: Clear teacher voice, emphasize 'What are they teaching' and 'MESSAGE'.

script_text: Those two questions help you understand any fact book!
